page_metadata.biotools__summary: Accurately identifying homopolymers in cDNA sequences using Hidden Markov Models. This can be extended to trimming poly(A)/poly(T) tails, or identifying A,C,G,T,or N homopolymer sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Accurately identifying homopolymers in cDNA sequences using Hidden Markov Models. This can be extended to trimming poly(A)/poly(T) tails, or identifying A,C,G,T,or N homopolymer sequences.
